Package team44.project2.controller.manager.employees

package team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.

Provides a tabular list of all employees (EmployeeListController) and a form for creating or editing individual employee records (EmployeeFormController), including fields for name, role, email, and active status.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controllers for the manager-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controllers for the inventory-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controllers for the menu-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controllers for the reporting screens accessible to managers.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    EmployeeFormController
    Controller for the employee form used by managers to create new employees or edit existing employee records including name, role, start date, email, password, and active status.
    EmployeeListController
    Controller for the employee list screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all employees in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete employee records.
